Blued Flower Katana  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 DEX: +10 STA: +10
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Blued Flower Katana
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 DEX: +10 STA: +10
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Mystique De'Kami
Lucy Entry By:Anaxis
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-08-02 07:08:10
Page Updated:Sun Dec 21st, 2014

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 60
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Veeshan's Peak 1.0
NPC Name
Kluzen the Protector


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Veeshan's Peak 1.0
Formerly dropped by Silverwing. New drop information unknown.

# Dec 06 2003 at 5:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759801853
219 posts
It is kinda crap though, the kids right in one point. As it is old, it STILL should have had possibly a better ratio, considering that epics pwned most of these and most never used these as epics were much better. If you can't get into VP, you most likely cant get epics, if you can't get epics, then dont even attempt VP.

142 posts
Anyone confirm if this wep actually has stats or not, I dont know anyone Personally that has this wep, although, I prob have some of the best weps hate to say of all my friends or such but...

Was thinking if its only 13 25 although nice JBOM 13 25 +10dex ac3 is better and only 900pp, hope it has the stats, would like to chase after that loot. Pls repost answer for me or email me under my link.

54 seasoned pathfinder -- Drinal Server

QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2003 at 11:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779724005
33 posts
This weapon isn't worth it unless you after exclusitivity. The amount off effort required to get into VP, combined with the fact that, if you mess up, you have one messy CR with no GM support, means this weapons (in this day and age) is most likely only going to be attained by those desperately seeking an iconic weapon.

#Anonymous, Posted: May 27 2001 at 9:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I know you had to go to hell and back for this sword but i hope who ever see this will look deep in there heart and be willing to donate it to a person who has not much time left. in the real world!

DAAA! Look its no drop, they CAN NOT TRANSFER IT TO ANOTHER!!!
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 10 2001 at 12:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Well, as a matter of fact, it IS good. and why can't SK's use this? That'ld be plain old dumb. Sk's either use very good 2hs swords (especially at the levels required for VP) or they use MUCH better 1hs, like the 19/29 MoSS for example, which isn't even nearly the best a SK can get in 1hs). So guys. lets review...1) It doesn't sucks 2) You don't want you Sk with this, this is a dual weilders weapon. ok, just thought I'ld set some stuff straight...
RE: Not very good and why can't SK's use?
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2001 at 1:33 PM Rating: Decent

Hehe i think you meant 1hb not 1hs..... Moss stands for MACE of the shadowed soul, so its 1hb bud. Just telling you before some a$$ comes on flaming you.
